summary: Redesign navigation shell and JSON/JSONL data browsing
description: Make Mega Vault Viewer less cramped, move vault details behind disclosure, keep search always visible, redesign navigation groups, make calendar compact/right rail, support JSON/JSONL search and viewing, and separate entities from projects.
acceptance: R1 compact header/vault detail behind disclosure; R2 search always visible and navigators regrouped with compact calendar right rail; R3 search includes JSON/JSONL and JSON/JSONL items open with formatted source; R4 entities/projects are separated by record_type/schema/collection; R5 browser smoke and npm run check pass
verification: cargo test --workspace; npm run check; browser smoke

evidence.summary: Redesigned shell: removed permanent Local-first marketing copy, compact current vault chip, moved vault details behind right-rail disclosure, always-visible search, grouped Time/Data/Browse nav, compact right-rail calendar. Added JSON/JSONL search/read support and entity/project split from records/entities.jsonl vs records/projects.jsonl; removed wikilink fallback that leaked project IDs into entities. Verification: cargo test --workspace, npm run check, browser DOM/vision smoke with searchVisible=true navGroups=Time/Data/Browse localFirstVisible=false blank=false.
